title: cluster-reduce output
description: Result of running the user's reducer on the cluster + pulling only its single JSON output. The `reduced` field is the parsed JSON the reducer wrote, surfaced inline so the agent doesn't need to re-read the local file.

run_id.description: Run identifier — typically YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-<short_sha>; loosely validated as filesystem-safe with no path separators.

output_path_remote.description: Path on the cluster where the reducer wrote its output (relative to remote_path or absolute).

output_path_local.description: Local path the reducer's output was rsync_pulled to.

reduced.description: Parsed reducer output (whatever JSON shape the reducer wrote).
